content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_APPOINTMENT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_APPOINTMENT]
( 
	[AppointmentID] [nvarchar](100) NOT NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DispositionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[RankID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SetBy] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[VerifiedBy] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ConfirmedBy] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ApptDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[SetDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[VerifiedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ConfirmedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LastChangedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ApptSet] [bit]  NULL,
	[Verified] [bit]  NULL,
	[Confirmed] [bit]  NULL,
	[Issued] [bit]  NULL,
	[NetIssued] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sat] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sold] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_AppointmentID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_RankID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_DispositionID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SetBy] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_VerifiedBy] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ConfirmedBy] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [AppointmentID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
